message:
fix(raptorq): require rch-backed repro_command in UnitLogEntry constructor

UnitLogEntry::new() now takes repro_command as a required parameter
(replacing the builder-pattern with_repro_command()). The constructor
asserts the command is non-empty and contains "rch exec --", enforcing
the remote-execution contract at construction time rather than only
during schema validation.

Schema validator updated: repro_command is now validated for both
presence and rch-exec content in unit log entries, matching the e2e
contract. Phase markers in e2e logs are now validated for exact order
match against REQUIRED_PHASE_MARKERS.

All call sites across pipeline tests, conformance tests, performance
invariant tests, and differential/metamorphic harnesses updated to
pass repro_command directly to the constructor.

Also includes pipeline max_object_size validation fix and decoder
symbols_per_block semantics update (total_k → full_block_k).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

         replay_ref,
-        outcome,

         "rch exec -- cargo test --test raptorq_perf_invariants seed_sweep_structured_logging -- --nocapture",
+        outcome,
     )
